title: HubBookingEvidenceBundle
description: Evidence bundle for native, manual, or imported confirmation. Carries proof strength without implying calm booked truth automatically.

evidenceBundleId.description: Stable identifier for the evidence bundle.

commitAttemptId.description: HubCommitAttempt that produced or consumed this evidence.

commitMode.description: Commit mode carried from the commit attempt.

independentConfirmationState.description: State of independent confirmation evidence after evaluation.

confirmationConfidence.description: Confirmation confidence from the gate evaluation.

competingAttemptMargin.description: Margin over competing attempts or competing evidence.

importedEvidenceRef.description: Imported evidence reference when commitMode = imported_confirmation.

nativeBookingReceiptRef.description: Native booking receipt or equivalent provider receipt.

evidenceCapturedAt.description: Time the evidence bundle became durable.

sourceRefs.description: Algorithm source refs carried into the contract pack.
